environment.weather: nighttime heavy rain with gusting wind and reduced visibility
environment.road_condition: low-flooded elevated merge zone with low friction and glare
annotations: radar multipath from water and guardrail
worn and partially missing lane markings near merge
rotating construction sign intermittently occludes view

actions: teleport to road 1 lane -3 at s=300.0
teleport to road 1 lane -3 at s=374.0
teleport to road 1 lane -2 at s=302.0
teleport to road 1 lane -4 at s=334.0
teleport to road 1 lane -4 at s=320.0
stage on road 1 lane -4 at s=185.0 until the drop event

story_actions: TruckA holds speed, then hydroplanes, drifts laterally within lane, and brakes when Ego closes to 60 m
CarB remains adjacent in the left lane and does not yield
SuvC holds high ramp speed, then force-merges into Ego lane and brakes to compress space when Ego closes to 46 m behind TruckA
MotorbikeD remains occluded on the ramp lane, then quickly cuts into Ego lane and surges when Ego closes to 34 m behind TruckA
CrateE drops into Ego lane when Ego closes to 30 m behind TruckA, then drifts laterally from pooled water
triggers: simulation time > 0.2 seconds starts baseline speed-hold actions
Ego relative longitudinal distance to TruckA < 60 m starts TruckA hydroplane braking and drift
Ego relative longitudinal distance to TruckA < 46 m starts SuvC forced merge and compression brake
Ego relative longitudinal distance to TruckA < 34 m starts MotorbikeD cut-in and surge
Ego relative longitudinal distance to TruckA < 30 m spawns CrateE into Ego lane
simulation time > 8.0 seconds repositions CrateE to encode rain-driven drift
stop_conditions: stop if Ego collides with any vehicle
stop if Ego collides with any miscellaneous object
stop if Ego reaches road 1 lane -3 at s=760.0
stop when simulation time exceeds 35.0 seconds
assumptions: A new simplified OpenDRIVE road is generated because the repository baseline road only had two mainline lanes and did not match the requested three-lane main carriageway.
Sensor degradation, glare, and intermittent construction-sign occlusion are preserved as Properties metadata because OpenSCENARIO 1.1 does not directly simulate those perception effects.
The scenario is controller-ready: Ego receives only initialization actions and the surrounding traffic drives the hazard chain.

matched: three mainline lanes with a right-side merge lane in the supporting OpenDRIVE asset
nighttime heavy-rain environment with low visibility, gusting wind, and reduced friction
lead cargo van decelerates and destabilizes in pooled water
left-lane blocker removes the simple left-escape option
high-speed ramp SUV intrudes into Ego lane
occluded motorcycle cuts into the shrinking gap
dark low-reflectivity crate drops into Ego lane and drifts
collision and bounded runtime stop conditions
extra: sensor impairment and construction-sign occlusion are represented as metadata Properties rather than executable dynamics
